title: redlabra-schema
description: Json Schema that specifies the structure, content, and validation rules for redlabra

project_name.label: Project Name
project_name.description: The name of the project in which the sample is included.

subproject_name.label: Subproject Name
subproject_name.description: Name of the subproject in which the sample is included.

public_health_sample_id.label: Public Health sample id (SIVIES)
public_health_sample_id.description: Identificator provided by the Public Health system.

collecting_lab_isolate_id.label: Isolate ID given by the COLLECTING institution
collecting_lab_isolate_id.description: Unique isolate (strain) identifier provided by the institution that collects the sample. Do not use patient or sample IDs. If more than one isolate is obtained from the same patient and only a single code is available, distinguish them by adding a suffix (e.g. -1, -2). For metagenomic data, use the same identifier as the sample.

collecting_lab_sample_id.label: Sample ID given by the COLLECTING institution
collecting_lab_sample_id.description: Sample ID provided by the institution that collects the sample.

submitting_lab_isolate_id.label: Isolate ID given by the SUBMITTING institution
submitting_lab_isolate_id.description: Unique isolate (strain) provided by the institution that submit the sample.

submitting_lab_sample_id.label: Sample ID given by the SUBMITTING institution
submitting_lab_sample_id.description: Sample ID provided by the institution that submit the sample.

microbiology_lab_isolate_id.label: Isolate ID given by the microbiology laboratory
microbiology_lab_isolate_id.description: Unique isolate (strain) identifier provided by the microbiology laboratory that performed the microbiological analysis and isolated the sample.

microbiology_lab_sample_id.label: Sample ID given in the microbiology laboratory
microbiology_lab_sample_id.description: Sample identification  provided by the microbiology laboratory that performed the microbiological analysis and isolated the sample.

gipi_isolate_id.label: Sample/Isolate ID given for GIPI submission
gipi_isolate_id.description: Unique identifier for submitting samples to the GIPI database.

patient_id.label: Patient ID
patient_id.description: Patient anonymized id, this id ideally could identify the patient in the collecting/submitting institution.

sequencing_sample_id.label: Sample/Isolate ID given for sequencing
sequencing_sample_id.description: ID assigned to the sample for sequencing. It must be a unique identifier. If the sample is re-sequenced, the run number should be included, preceded by a dot.

ena_study_accession.label: Study accession
ena_study_accession.description: An identifier data field which describes the International Nucleotide Sequence Database Collaboration (INSDC) accession number of the BioProject(s) to which the BioSample belongs.

ena_sample_accession.label: ENA Sample Id
ena_sample_accession.description: ID generated when uploading the sample to ENA.

collecting_institution.label: Collecting institution
collecting_institution.description: The name of the agency/institution that collected the sample.

collecting_institution_code_1.label: CCN
collecting_institution_code_1.description: CCN code from the agency/institution that collected the sample.

collecting_institution_code_2.label: CODCNH
collecting_institution_code_2.description: CODCNH code from the agency/institution that collected the sample.

collecting_institution_address.label: Collecting Institution Address
collecting_institution_address.description: The mailing address of the agency collecting the sample.
examples: 655 Lab St, Vancouver, British Columbia, V5N 2A2, Canada

collecting_institution_email.label: Collecting Institution Email
collecting_institution_email.description: The email address of the contact responsible for follow-up regarding the sample.

geo_loc_latitude.label: Collecting Institution Geo Loc Latitude
geo_loc_latitude.description: The latitude coordinates of the geographical location of sample collection.

geo_loc_longitude.label: Collecting Institution Geo Loc Longitude
geo_loc_longitude.description: The longitude coordinates of the geographical location of sample collection.

geo_loc_city.label: Collecting Institution City
geo_loc_city.description: The city where the sample was collected.

geo_loc_country.label: Collecting Institution Country
geo_loc_country.description: Country where the sample was collected.

geo_loc_region.label: Collecting Institution Province
geo_loc_region.description: The county/region where the sample was collected.

geo_loc_state.label: Collecting Institution Autonomic Community
geo_loc_state.description: The state/province/territory where the sample was collected.

collecting_institution_department.label: Collecting Institution Service/Unit/Department
collecting_institution_department.description: The service, unit or department where the sample was taken.

submitting_institution.label: Submitting Institution
submitting_institution.description: The name of the agency that submitted the sequence to the platform.

submitting_institution_id.label: Submitting Institution ID
submitting_institution_id.description: The Institution identifier that is submitting data or information.

submitting_institution_address.label: Submitting Institutio Address
submitting_institution_address.description: The mailing address of the agency submitting the sequence.
examples: 123 Sunnybrooke St, Toronto, Ontario, M4P 1L6, Canada

submitting_institution_email.label: Submitting Institution Email
submitting_institution_email.description: The email address of the contact responsible for follow-up regarding the sequence.

sequencing_institution.label: Sequencing Institution
sequencing_institution.description: The name of the agency that generated the sequence

sample_collection_date.label: Sample Collection Date
sample_collection_date.description: The date on which the sample was collected. YYYY-MM-DD

sample_received_date.label: Sample Received Date
sample_received_date.description: The date on which the sample was received. YYYY-MM-DD

specimen_source.label: Specimen source
specimen_source.description: Source of the specimen, merge of anatomical_part, anatomical_material, body_product and collection method.

isolate_delivery_type.label: Sample delivery type
isolate_delivery_type.description: Sample delivery type, distinguishing between isolate, sequence and not-delivered.

representative_isolate_id.label: Representative isolate ID
representative_isolate_id.description: The unique ID  of the representative isolate

patient_birth_date.label: Birth date
patient_birth_date.description: (Recommended) Host birth date. Fill Host Age Years if Birth date is not available.

host_age_years.label: Host Age Years
host_age_years.description: Age of host at the time of sampling. Age between 3 and 110 years old. Mandatory only if Birth date is not available.

host_age_months.label: Host Age Months
host_age_months.description: ONLY when [Host Age years] < 3. Age of host at the time of sampling. If the age is less than three years indicate in months between 0 and 36.

host_gender.label: Host Gender
host_gender.description: The gender of the host at the time of sample collection. Recommended.

host_common_name.label: Host
host_common_name.description: The commonly used name of the host.

host_scientific_name.label: Host Scientific Name
host_scientific_name.description: The taxonomic, or scientific name of the host.

pathogen_invasion_status.label: Status of pathogen presence
pathogen_invasion_status.description: Indicates the status of pathogen presence, distinguishing between Colonization, Infection and Not Provided.

associated_with_outbreak.label: Associated with outbreak
associated_with_outbreak.description: Indicates whether the isolate is associated with an outbreak.

species.label: Organism species
species.description: Species-level taxonomic assignment obtained from the bioinformatics analysis, according to the Codes of Nomenclature and consisting of a Genus and species. Do not report K. oxytoca or K. aerogenes if the bioinformatics analysis only supports assignment at species complex or group level.

species_group.label: Organism group
species_group.description: The species name applied to a plant, animal, or other organism, according to the Codes of Nomenclature, consisting of a Genus and species. Do not report K. oxytoca or K. aerogenes.

family.label: Family
family.description: The name or designation of taxonomy family for the species.

tax_id.label: Tax ID
tax_id.description: The NCBI Taxon identifier for the sequenced organism.

reference_genome_accession.label: Reference genome accession
reference_genome_accession.description: Accession number of the closest reference genome identified by similarity search tools (e.g. Mash, KmerFinder or similar).

mash_distance.label: Mash distance
mash_distance.description: The genomic distance to the reference, given by the software Mash.

analysis_type.label: Analysis Type
analysis_type.description: The type of analysis performed to generate the associated result

value.label: Analysis Type Value
value.description: The result or measurement obtained from the specified analysis type

sequence_type_1_scheme.label: Scheme Name used to compute the sequence type 1
sequence_type_1_scheme.description: The scheme name utilized to designate sequence type 1.

sequence_type_2_scheme.label: Scheme Name used to compute the sequence type 2
sequence_type_2_scheme.description: The scheme name utilized to designate sequence type 2.

origin.label: Origin of sequence type designation
origin.description: Origin source of the sequence type name.

mlst_profile.label: Multilocus sequence typing (MLST) profile
mlst_profile.description: The multilocus sequence typing (MLST) profile corresponding to the isolate, defined by the allelic variants of the selected housekeeping genes.

clonal_complex_1.label: Clonal Complex 1
clonal_complex_1.description: The clonal complex 1 to which the isolate belongs, determined based on shared alleles in the MLST profile.

clonal_complex_2.label: Clonal Complex 2
clonal_complex_2.description: The clonal complex 2 to which the isolate belongs, determined based on shared alleles in the MLST profile.

complex_type.label: Complex Type
complex_type.description: The complex type name obtained by cgMLST.

origin.label: Origin of complex type designation
origin.description: Origin source of the complex type.

complex_type_scheme.label: cgMLST scheme
complex_type_scheme.description: The cgMLST scheme utilized to designate complex type.

hc5.label: Hierarchical Cluster (HC5)
hc5.description: Hierarchical clustering designation at HC5 level based on cgMLST results.

hc10.label: Hierarchical Cluster (HC10)
hc10.description: Hierarchical clustering designation at HC10 level based on cgMLST results.

amr_detection_method.label: AMR detection method
amr_detection_method.description: Method used to detect AMR genes (Sanger, WGS, or non-sequencing).

amr_software_name.label: AMR software name
amr_software_name.description: The software name used for AMR annotation.

amr_software_version.label: AMR software version
amr_software_version.description: The version number of the AMR annotation software.

amr_software_params.label: AMR software params
amr_software_params.description: The parameters and settings configured within the AMR annotation software.

amr_database_name.label: AMR database name
amr_database_name.description: The database name used for AMR annotation.

amr_database_version.label: AMR database version
amr_database_version.description: The version number of the AMR annotation database.

allele_name.label: β-lactamase allele
allele_name.description: Name of the specific allele variant of a β-lactamase gene. If multiple genes are present, please list all of them separated by “;” and following the standard nomenclature (e.g., blaOXA-48).

gene_name.label: β-lactamase gene
gene_name.description: The name of the genes encoding betalactamases.

origin.label: Origin of carbapenemase genes designation
origin.description: Origin source of the betalactamase gene identification.

coverage.label: Gene coverage (%)
coverage.description: Percentage of the reference gene sequence covered by reads in the sample.

depth_of_coverage.label: Gene depth of coverage
depth_of_coverage.description: Average sequencing depth across the detected resistance gene.

reference_genome.label: Reference genome
reference_genome.description: The genbank accession number of the reference genome.

locus_genes.label: Locus_gene
locus_genes.description: Locus and name of the chromosomic genes involved in mutational AR.

origin.label: Origin of virulence genes designation
origin.description: Origin source of the virulencec gene identification.

MIC_value.label: MIC value
MIC_value.description: The Minimum Inhibitory Concentration (MIC) value obtained by AST.

ATB.label: Antibiotic
ATB.description: The name of the antibioitc for which the MIC has been determined.

AST_method.label: Antibiotic susceptibility testing method
AST_method.description: The method used for determined the MIC value.

EUCAST/CLSI.label: EUCAST_CLSI
EUCAST/CLSI.description: Usage of EUCAST or CLSI clínical breakpoints.

MIC_interpretation_EUCAST.label: MIC_interpretation_eucast
MIC_interpretation_EUCAST.description: EUCAST clinical interpretation of the MIC value.

EUCAST_guidelines_version.label: EUCAST_guidelines_version
EUCAST_guidelines_version.description: The version of EUCAST clinical breakpoints used for MIC categorization.

MIC_interpretation_CLSI.label: MIC_interpretation_CLSI
MIC_interpretation_CLSI.description: CLSI clinical interpretation of the MIC value.

CLSI_guidelines_version.label: CLSI_guidelines_version
CLSI_guidelines_version.description: The version of CLSI clinical breakpoints used for MIC categorization.

authors.label: Authors
authors.description: Names of individuals contributing to the processes of sample collection, sequence generation, analysis, and data submission.
examples: Dr. Jane Doe, Dr. John Smith

comments.label: Comments
comments.description: Optional free-text field for recording additional information, observations, or relevant metadata not captured by other variables. Each comment must start with the author’s name and be appended if previous comments exist.
examples: Sample collected from a clinical trial.

purpose_of_sequencing.label: Purpose of Sequencing
purpose_of_sequencing.description: The reason that the sample was sequenced.

library_source.label: Sequencing source material
library_source.description: Molecule type used to make the library.

all_in_one_library_kit.label: Commercial All-in-one library kit
all_in_one_library_kit.description: Packaged kits (containing adapters, indexes, enzymes, buffers etc), tailored for specific sequencing workflows, which allow the simplified preparation of sequencing-ready libraries for small genomes, amplicons, and plasmids.

library_preparation_kit.label: Library Preparation Kit
library_preparation_kit.description: The name of the DNA library preparation kit used to generate the library being sequenced.

enrichment_panel.label: Enrichment panel/assay
enrichment_panel.description: Commercial or custom panel/assay used for enrichment.

sequencing_instrument_platform.label: Sequencing Instrument Platform
sequencing_instrument_platform.description: A sequencing plaform (brand) is a name of a company that produces sequencer equipment.

sequencing_instrument_model.label: Sequencing Instrument Model
sequencing_instrument_model.description: The model of the sequencing instrument used.

run_alias.label: Run Alias
run_alias.description: A sequence of characters used to uniquely identify a particular run of a test on a particular batch of samples.

number_of_samples_in_run.label: Number Of Samples In Run
number_of_samples_in_run.description: Total count of samples included in the sequencing run.

flowcell_kit.label: Flowcell Kit
flowcell_kit.description: Flowcell sequencer used for sequencing the sample.
examples: NextSeq 500/550 High Output Kit v2.5 (75 Cycles)

sequencing_date.label: Sequencing Date
sequencing_date.description: The date the sample was sequenced. YYYY-MM-DD

sequence_file_R1.label: Sequence file R1
sequence_file_R1.description: A data field which describes the user-specified filename of the read 1 (r1) file.

sequence_file_R1_md5.label: Sequence fastq R1 md5
sequence_file_R1_md5.description: Checksum md5 value to validate successful file transmission in R1.

sequence_file_path_R1.label: Filepath R1
sequence_file_path_R1.description: The filepath of the r1 file.

sequence_file_R2.label: Sequence file R2
sequence_file_R2.description: A data field which describes the user-specified filename of the read 2 (r2) file.

sequence_file_R2_md5.label: Sequence fastq R2 md5
sequence_file_R2_md5.description: Checksum md5 value to validate successful file transmission in R2.

sequence_file_path_R2.label: Filepath R2
sequence_file_path_R2.description: The filepath of the r2 file.

fast5_filename.label: Filename fast5
fast5_filename.description: The user-specified filename of the FAST5 file.

fast5_filepath.label: Filepath fast5
fast5_filepath.description: The filepath of the FAST5 file.

bioinformatics_analysis_date.label: processing_date
bioinformatics_analysis_date.description: The time of a sample analysis process. YYYY-MM-DD

bioinformatics_protocol_software_name.label: Bioinformatics protocol name
bioinformatics_protocol_software_name.description: Protocol used in the bioinformatics analysis pipeline.

bioinformatics_protocol_software_version.label: Name of bioinformatics analysis pipeline
bioinformatics_protocol_software_version.description: The bioinformatcs pipeline name utilized to analyze Next-Generation Sequencing (NGS) data.

bioinformatics_protocol_run_name.label: Name identifying a specific pipeline run
bioinformatics_protocol_run_name.description: The run name which detnotes the bioinformatics analysis ID.

ns_per_100_kbp.label: Ns per 100 kbp
ns_per_100_kbp.description: The number of N symbols present in the consensus fasta sequence, per 100kbp of sequence.

preprocessing_software_version.label: Preprocessing software version
preprocessing_software_version.description: Version of the preprocessing software used.

preprocessing_params.label: Preprocessing params
preprocessing_params.description: The parameters and settings used to perform preprocessing analysis.

read_length.label: Read length
read_length.description: Number of base pairs per read.

number_of_reads_sequenced.label: Preprocessing raw reads count
number_of_reads_sequenced.description: The number of reads sequenced before adapter trimming and quiality filtering (million).

pass_reads.label: Preprocessing filtered reads count
pass_reads.description: The number of reads remaining after adapter trimming and quality filtering (million).

species_identification_software_name.label: Software name used for species identification/contamination.
species_identification_software_name.description: The name of the software used to identify the organism in the sample.

species_identification_software_version.label: Software version used for species identification/contamination.
species_identification_software_version.description: The version of the software used to identify the organism in the sample.

reads_genome_coverage_value.label: Genome coverage value
reads_genome_coverage_value.description: The amount of a reference sequence covered by a sequence of interest.

reads_genome_depth_value.label: Genome depth value
reads_genome_depth_value.description: The average number of reads representing a given nucleotide in the reconstructed sequence.

assembly_params.label: Assembly params
assembly_params.description: The parameters and settings used to perform genome assembly.

assembly_method.label: Reads assembled using de novo or mapping strategy.
assembly_method.description: Assembly method refers to how the reads were assembled into contigs for which either a de novo or mapping (reference based) strategy is used.

assembly.label: Software used for genome assembly.
assembly.description: The name of the software used for genome assembly.

assembly_version.label: Version number of the assembly software.
assembly_version.description: The version number of the genome assembly software used for the genome assembly process.

assembly_type.label: The type of assembly performed by the software.
assembly_type.description: Assembly type performed by the software (available values: short, long or hybrid).

assembly_filename.label: Filename of the assembly
assembly_filename.description: The filename of the assembled genome including extension.

assembly_n50.label: Assembly N50
assembly_n50.description: N50 statistic computed for the contigs produced by the assembly process.

assembly_genome_size.label: Assembled genome size
assembly_genome_size.description: The assembly genome size is the sum of all lengths of a sequence assembly's contigs. (Units: Mbp)

assembly_genome_fraction_value.label: Assembly genome fraction
assembly_genome_fraction_value.description: The number of matches (identical characters) in positions from an alignment of two molecular sequences as a percentage.

assembly_sequence_filepath.label: Consensus sequence filepath
assembly_sequence_filepath.description: The filepath of the consensus sequence file.

annotation_software_name.label: Annotation software name
annotation_software_name.description: The name of software used for genome annotation.

annotation_software_version.label: Annotation software version
annotation_software_version.description: The version number of the genome annotation software employed in the annotation process.

annotation_software_params.label: Annotation params
annotation_software_params.description: The parameters and settings configured within the annotation software for the genome annotation process.

annotation_database_name.label: Annotation reference database name
annotation_database_name.description: The name of the reference database utilized for annotating genomic features and sequences.

annotation_database_version.label: Annotation reference database version
annotation_database_version.description: The version of the reference database utilized for annotating genomic features and sequences.

annotation_protein_coding_features.label: Annotated protein-coding features
annotation_protein_coding_features.description: The protein-coding features within the annotated genome assembly.

annotation_ribosomal_rna_features.label: Annotated ribosomal RNA features
annotation_ribosomal_rna_features.description: The ribosomal RNA features within the annotated genome assembly.

ena_sample_description.label: Sample description
ena_sample_description.description: Free text description of the sample.
examples: Sputum sample from patient with chronic obstructive pulmonary disease

ECDC Resistance profile.label: ECDC Resistance profile
ECDC Resistance profile.description: Resistance profile of the isolate using the ECDC criteria.

IDSA Resistance profile.label: IDSA Resistance profile
IDSA Resistance profile.description: Resistance profile of the isolate using the IDSA criteria.

cloxacillin_inhibition_test.label: Cloxacillin inhibition test
cloxacillin_inhibition_test.description: Phenotypic assay for ampC production determination.

ESBL_test.label: Extended-spectrum β-lactamase (ESBL) test
ESBL_test.description: Phenotypic assay for Extended-spectrum β-lactamase (ESBL) detection.

carbapenemase_class_a_test.label: Carbapenemase class A test
carbapenemase_class_a_test.description: Phenotypic assay for class A carbapenamse detection.
